info.description: Filtered OpenAPI description for the stateless synchronous Alibaba Cloud Video Segmentation proxy. The gateway serves only the allowlisted operations defined in the paired YAML manifest.
info.title: Alibaba Cloud Video Segmentation API

post.description: This topic describes the syntax and examples of the SegmentVideoBody operation for video portrait segmentation. The gateway injects Alibaba RPC Action=SegmentVideoBody and Version automatically before forwarding the paid request upstream.

VideoUrl.description: The video URL. We recommend using an OSS link from the China (Shanghai) region. For files stored locally or via OSS links from regions other than Shanghai, see [File URL Processing](~~155645~~).

Data.description: The returned data content. This data can be obtained only after the asynchronous task execution has succeeded, by invoking the [GetAsyncJobResult](~~607824~~) API and performing JSON deserialization on its Result field.

VideoUrl.description:
The URL address of the output video.  
> This URL is temporary and has a validity period of 30 minutes. It will expire and become inaccessible afterward. If you need to retain the file for a longer duration or permanently, access the URL and download the file within 30 minutes, then store it in your own OSS bucket or other storage space.

Message.description: The prompt message after committing an asynchronous task.
Message.example: 该调用为异步调用，任务已提交成功，请以requestId的值作为jobId参数调用同类目下GetAsyncJobResult接口查询任务执行状态和结果。
